location: Trade the Remembrance of the Grafted (dropped by Godrick the Grafted) to Finger Reader Enia at Roundtable Hold. A Wandering Mausoleum with a bell can be used to get a duplicate later, but only one copy total is obtainable per playthrough via either method.
tactics: Fought at the end of Stormveil Castle; rest at the Secluded Cell grace right before the fog gate, or use Liftside Chamber to restock beforehand
Phase 1 axe swings have deceptive pauses before they land — after his roll-and-leap Storm Assault, get behind him for a free hit
At roughly 60% HP he cuts off his own arm and grafts on a dragon head, adding fire breath attacks (Sweeping Flame, Striding Flame) — stand to his side, his back is open during these
Nepheli Loux's summon sign is outside the fog gate if you talk to her in her room first
lore: Godrick the Grafted's personal greataxe, worked in gold and stamped with a beast crest — a weapon he wielded as a symbolic claim to Godfrey's might and the golden bloodline he desperately tried to graft onto his own maimed body.

builds.name: Strength/quality bruiser
builds.why: Balanced D/D Strength-Dexterity scaling on a hard-hitting two-hander with a crowd-control shockwave skill.

builds.name: Crowd-control caster-hybrid
builds.why: "I Command Thee, Kneel!" fires shockwaves that hit multiple enemies, useful for groups and PvP zoning.
